case_title: THE CITY TOW VS EDWARDS MOV AND STOR INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY THE CITY TOW AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS MOV AND STOR INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-26-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY TOW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EDWARDS MOV AND STOR INC. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,560.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EDWARDS MOV AND STOR INC.
